Mainfail WebUI Uploader

Upload a new index.html.gz to an ESP3D board without opening the ESP3D start screen first.

Connect your computer to the printer AP first, then use the board address below. Default ESP3D AP address is usually 192.168.0.1.
Select dist/standard/index.html.gz. The selected file name should be index.html.gz. After upload, reload the board page.

Target: http://192.168.0.1/upload, path /
